name: Peppermint Tea
summary: A caffeine-free herbal infusion whose active compound, menthol, relaxes the smooth muscle of the digestive tract.

benefits.claim: Eases irritable bowel and digestive cramping
benefits.mechanism: Menthol blocks calcium channels in gut smooth muscle, relaxing it (an antispasmodic effect). In randomized trials, peppermint oil — the concentrated form — improved global symptoms and abdominal pain in irritable bowel syndrome.

citations.title: The impact of peppermint oil on the irritable bowel syndrome: a meta-analysis of the pooled clinical data (Alammar et al., BMC Complement Altern Med 2019)

surprisingFacts.text: The strongest evidence is for enteric-coated peppermint oil capsules, which survive the stomach to release menthol in the intestine — tea is gentler but works through the same menthol.
